CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BETH I. GOLUB OF TYSON & MENDES, TEL. NO. 1-858-459-4400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. HATHANH NGUYEN OF CLINTON & CLINTON LAW FIRM, TL. NO. 1-562-216-5000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SAN DIEGO TZXI AND AKILU GEBREGZIABHER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS RASIER, LLC, RASIER-CA, LLC, UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is Off calendar in light of the ruling on Defendants Ryan Richardson and Erin Phebus's motion for order changing venue. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported. =302/HK

Notice Of Joinder And Joinder To Defendants, Ryan Richardson And Erin Phebus Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BETH I. GOLUB OF TYSON & MENDES, TEL. NO. 1-858-459-4400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. HATHANH NGUYEN OF CLINTON & CLINTON LAW FIRM, TL. NO. 1-562-216-5000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SAN DIEGO TZXI AND AKILU GEBREGZIABHER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS AKLILU GEBREGZIABHER and SAN DIEGO TAXI & LIVERY ASSOCIATION LTD'S Joinder To Defendants, Ryan Richardson And Erin Phebus Motion For Change Of Venue is Off calendar in light of the ruling on Defendants Ryan Richardson and Erin Phebus's motion for order changing venue. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported. =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Changing Venue
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. BETH I. GOLUB OF TYSON & MENDES, TEL. NO. 1-858-459-4400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. HATHANH NGUYEN OF CLINTON & CLINTON LAW FIRM, TL. NO. 1-562-216-5000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SAN DIEGO TZXI AND AKILU GEBREGZIABHER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants Ryan Richardson and Erin Phebus's motion for order changing venue is granted. The motion is not opposed, is joined in by other defendants, and plaintiff Andrew Keller filed a notice of non-opposition to the motion. The case will be transferred to San Diego County. All costs of transfer will be paid by plaintiff Andrew Keller. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported. =302/hk
